profile.name: Powertech Technology Inc.
profile.name_tw: 力成科技股份有限公司
profile.description: Powertech Technology is a Taiwan-based OSAT (Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test) company specializing in memory packaging and testing. The company provides services for DRAM, Flash memory, and logic devices. It is a key partner for major memory manufacturers.

market_data.revenue_note: Revenue data not accessible from current network. Company website reachable but IR section returned 404.
market_data.stock_price_note: Stock price data not accessible from current network

strengths: Specialized memory OSAT capabilities (DRAM, Flash testing)
Strong relationships with major memory manufacturers (Micron, SK Hynix)
Advanced packaging technologies for HBM and high-bandwidth memory
Strategic location in Taiwan's semiconductor ecosystem
weaknesses: Heavy dependence on memory market cycles
opportunities: HBM demand explosion driven by AI/GPU applications
Growing test complexity requiring specialized capabilities
Potential expansion into logic device testing
threats: Memory market volatility and oversupply cycles
Competition from larger OSAT players expanding memory services
Capital intensity of advanced packaging equipment

source_quality_note: Company website accessible but IR section returned 404. Financial data not accessible. Bing search results only returned unrelated Chinese companies. Previous run also had T3 sources with limited data.
notes: Enrichment attempt. Previous score 65 with T3 sources. Company website accessible but IR section broken. Financial data still not available. Network conditions similar to previous run.
